steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The goal is explicit: indicate when the board game was released. Scan the four notes for the one that answers "when." Only one note contains a year: "It was released in 2005." Every other note covers who made the game or what it is based on — none of those answer "when."

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "The board game *Arkham Horror* was designed by Richard Launius.": This states who designed the game, not when it was released. ✗
  • "The board game *Arkham Horror* was released in 2005.": This directly uses the release-year note to state when the game came out — exactly what the goal requires. ✓
  • "The board game *Arkham Horror* is based on horror stories.": This describes the game's source material, not its release date. ✗
  • "The board game *Arkham Horror* is based on the writing of H. P. Lovecraft.": This identifies the author whose work inspired the game, not when the game was released. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
